rationale: M5 finding ADDRESSED, verified empirically. (1) TestPanelVerify_NonBeadMissingTargetRef now asserts strings.Contains(out, "no longer exists") (panel_test.go:843). That phrase is emitted only by the leg-5 renderings (panel.go:444 verify summary; panel.go:696 sanitized decision); the leg-5b GitErr path renders "could not verify target %s: %v" and gitutil.ErrRefNotFound is "ref not found", so the %v cannot smuggle the phrase in. (2) Re-ran my M5 mutation in a /tmp copy — IsRefNotFound -> func(error)bool{return false} at panel.go:350 — the test goes RED on exactly the new assertion (mutant output shows the leg-5b transient rendering, no "no longer exists"); pristine passes. Classification genuinely pinned. (3) TestSanitizeNonBeadDecision gained leg (3) abandoned and leg (4) round-mismatch rows; buildResult sets RoundMismatch=p.Round!=round, so both route the real gate legs and the RawMergeFence("") strip assertions are non-vacuous. TestPanelVerify_NonBeadIncompleteBlocks exists; both subtests pass. (4) git diff b641a9fe..15dab51b -- panel.go is zero lines; only panel_test.go changed (+85/-5), so my round-1 code review (no findings) stands. Full cmd/mindspec + internal/panel packages pass.

findings.detail: IsRefNotFound classification now pinned: mutation IsRefNotFound->false in resolvePanelGateFacts turns TestPanelVerify_NonBeadMissingTargetRef RED (fails at panel_test.go:844 on the missing "no longer exists" phrase); pristine green. Phrase is exclusive to leg-5 rendering — leg-5b emits "could not verify target ...: ref not found".

Amendment scope confirmed: panel.go byte-identical between round-1 commit b641a9fe and amended 15dab51b; panel_test.go only (+85/-5). New leg (3)/(4) sanitize rows exercise real gate legs (Abandoned flag / buildResult RoundMismatch) and the new E2E TestPanelVerify_NonBeadIncompleteBlocks (verify no-PASS + tally non-zero, no bead/ or mindspec-complete leak) passes.
